title: サウジアラビアRCにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the start of the Saudi Arabia R.C., the
student council's general manager comes to wish
Symboli Rudolf well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf instructs the manager to watch her
performance in the race, and the manager nods.
With that, Rudolf departs for the race full of
confidence.
